_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing intelligence collection analysis
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Skill LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.504), LS-K-009 (LS, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.510). Shared vocabulary: [performing, skill]. NICE-only terms [analysis, collection, intelligence] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.879, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.1%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in performing intelligence collection analysis" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 ≈ STS 0.510 (gap 0.017). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [performing, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [performing, skill]. NICE-only: [analysis, collection, intelligence]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 97.1% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
